follow.en: Give that story a title.

cards.en: Tell a short story about a place that helped you think.

follow.ko: 들은 사람 중 한 명이 비슷한 경험 이어가기.
follow.en: Someone who listened shares a similar moment.

cards.en: Tell a short story about a conversation you appreciated.

follow.en: Give that story a title.

cards.en: When do you feel most like yourself?

follow.ko: 답한 사람에게 딱 하나만 더 물어봐.

cards.en: What kind of person makes you feel safe?

follow.en: Who related the most? Raise a hand.

cards.en: What is something you care less about now?
cards.ko: 예전보다 덜 신경 쓰게 된 건 뭐야?

follow.ko: 그 답 듣고 떠오른 사람 있으면 말해줘.
follow.en: Did the answer remind you of anyone? Say so.

cards.en: What belief have you changed your mind about?
cards.ko: 생각이 바뀐 믿음이나 가치관은?

follow.ko: 답한 사람에게 딱 하나만 더 물어봐.
follow.en: Ask the answerer one more question — just one.

cards.en: What part of your life feels different from what people see?
cards.ko: 사람들이 보는 모습과 실제로 다른 부분은?

follow.en: Who related the most? Raise a hand.

cards.en: What is a worry you are slowly letting go of?
cards.ko: 조금씩 내려놓고 있는 걱정은 뭐야?

follow.ko: 그 답 듣고 떠오른 사람 있으면 말해줘.
follow.en: Did the answer remind you of anyone? Say so.

cards.en: What makes you feel quietly proud of yourself?
cards.ko: 조용히 스스로가 뿌듯해지는 순간은?

follow.ko: 답한 사람에게 딱 하나만 더 물어봐.
follow.en: Ask the answerer one more question — just one.

cards.en: What kind of compliment stays with you?
cards.ko: 오래 기억에 남는 칭찬은 어떤 칭찬이야?

follow.en: Who related the most? Raise a hand.

cards.en: What is something you want to protect about yourself?
cards.ko: 내 안에서 지키고 싶은 부분은 뭐야?

follow.ko: 그 답 듣고 떠오른 사람 있으면 말해줘.
follow.en: Did the answer remind you of anyone? Say so.

cards.en: What does a good day feel like to you lately?
cards.ko: 요즘 나에게 좋은 하루는 어떤 느낌이야?

follow.ko: 답한 사람에게 딱 하나만 더 물어봐.
follow.en: Ask the answerer one more question — just one.

cards.en: What helps you trust someone over time?
cards.ko: 시간이 지날수록 사람을 믿게 만드는 건 뭐야?

follow.en: Who related the most? Raise a hand.

cards.en: What is something you are learning to accept?
cards.ko: 받아들이는 법을 배우고 있는 건 뭐야?

follow.ko: 그 답 듣고 떠오른 사람 있으면 말해줘.
follow.en: Did the answer remind you of anyone? Say so.

cards.en: What kind of silence feels comfortable to you?
cards.ko: 어떤 침묵이 편하게 느껴져?

follow.ko: 답한 사람에게 딱 하나만 더 물어봐.
follow.en: Ask the answerer one more question — just one.

cards.en: What is a small sign that you are doing okay?
cards.ko: 내가 괜찮다는 걸 알려주는 작은 신호는?

follow.en: Who related the most? Raise a hand.

cards.en: What makes a place feel safe to you?
cards.ko: 어떤 공간이 안전하게 느껴져?

follow.ko: 그 답 듣고 떠오른 사람 있으면 말해줘.
follow.en: Did the answer remind you of anyone? Say so.

cards.en: What is something you want to remember more often?
cards.ko: 더 자주 기억하고 싶은 건 뭐야?

follow.ko: 답한 사람에게 딱 하나만 더 물어봐.
follow.en: Ask the answerer one more question — just one.

cards.en: What kind of support feels best to you?
cards.ko: 나에게 가장 잘 맞는 응원은 어떤 거야?

follow.en: Who related the most? Raise a hand.

cards.en: What is a version of yourself you are growing into?
cards.ko: 나는 어떤 모습으로 조금씩 변해가고 있어?

follow.ko: 그 답 듣고 떠오른 사람 있으면 말해줘.
follow.en: Did the answer remind you of anyone? Say so.

cards.en: What small thing I do makes you feel cared for?
cards.ko: 내가 하는 작은 행동 중 챙김받는 느낌이 드는 건?

follow.ko: 답 듣고 떠오른 우리 순간 하나 말해줘.
follow.en: Share one moment of ours that comes to mind.

cards.en: What random moment with me do you still remember?
cards.ko: 아직도 기억나는 우리 둘의 사소한 순간은?

follow.en: Say one word about how that felt to hear.

cards.en: What should we do more often together?
cards.ko: 우리가 같이 더 자주 했으면 하는 건?

follow.en: Now ask the same question back.

cards.en: What was your honest first impression of me?
cards.ko: 솔직히 나의 첫인상은 어땠어?

follow.en: Share one moment of ours that comes to mind.

cards.en: What kind of date feels most like us?

follow.en: Say one word about how that felt to hear.

cards.en: What tiny habit of mine do you secretly like?
cards.ko: 내 습관 중 은근히 마음에 드는 건?

follow.en: Now ask the same question back.

cards.en: What is one thing we are surprisingly good at together?
cards.ko: 우리가 같이 하면 생각보다 잘하는 건?

follow.en: Share one moment of ours that comes to mind.

cards.en: What should our next small adventure be?

follow.en: Say one word about how that felt to hear.

cards.en: What is one simple thing that makes you feel closer to me?
cards.ko: 나와 더 가까워진다고 느끼게 하는 작은 일은?

follow.en: Now ask the same question back.

cards.en: What is something I do that makes you laugh?
cards.ko: 내가 하는 행동 중 너를 웃게 만드는 건?

follow.en: Share one moment of ours that comes to mind.

follow.en: Say one word about how that felt to hear.

follow.en: Now ask the same question back.

cards.ko: 우리가 둘이서 잘 해내는 건 뭐야?

follow.en: Say one word about how that felt to hear.

cards.en: What makes our conversations feel easy?

follow.en: Now ask the same question back.

cards.en: What is a small way I can support you better?

follow.en: Share one moment of ours that comes to mind.

cards.en: What should we celebrate more often?

cards.en: A planned date or a surprise date?
cards.ko: 계획된 데이트 vs 깜짝 데이트?

follow.en: Each gives one sentence on why.
